frames.description: Street view showing a State Bank of India (SBI) branch on the left side of the road. The building is multi-storied with some trees in front and blue-and-white painted curbs.
frames.signs_and_transcription: State Bank of India (SBI) Baghbazar Branch; Bengali: স্টেট ব্যাঙ্ক অফ ইন্ডিয়া বাগবাজার শাখা (State Bank of India Baghbazar Branch).
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Infrastructure: SBI building, street lamps with multiple globes, trees, blue and white curb stones.

frames.description: A view of a narrow street intersection with old buildings. A large tree trunk is in the foreground. Several people are sitting or standing near small stalls.
frames.signs_and_transcription: Amul; GHOSH & SON'S.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: A small white delivery van, a motorcycle. Pedestrians: People sitting on the left under a tree, some walking. Infrastructure: Old urban buildings, overhead power lines.

frames.description: Street view passing by green bushes and several signs for a hospital. The background shows a yellow-tinted building with brown shutters.
frames.signs_and_transcription: STERLING HOSPITAL; Bengali: স্টার্লিং হাসপাতাল (Sterling Hospital). Round sign: NO PARKING BOTH SIDE.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Pedestrians: A man in a horizontal striped shirt near the curb. Infrastructure: Street lamps, green hedge, blue and white curb.

frames.description: A small white truck is moving along the street. In the background, there's another Sterling Hospital sign and a shop named 'Saphire'.
frames.signs_and_transcription: STERLING HOSPITAL; Saphire; Bengali: স্টার্লিং হাসপাতাল (Sterling Hospital).
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Small white truck carrying planks. Pedestrians: Driver inside the truck. Infrastructure: Multi-story buildings, trees.

frames.description: View of a green building decorated with Brazil flag paintings on its ground floor. A traffic sign is visible in the foreground.
frames.signs_and_transcription: Round traffic sign with a blue and yellow circle.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Infrastructure: Green building with Brazil themes, street lamps, small garden area, blue and white curb.

frames.description: The scene shows a yellow-walled shop with closed shutters. Green bushes line the road in front.
frames.signs_and_transcription: RADHEY.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Infrastructure: Shop building, street lamps, trees, bushes.

frames.description: Street view passing an open area with a Sterling Hospital sign nestled among trees and plants.
frames.signs_and_transcription: STERLING HOSPITAL; Bengali: স্টার্লিং হাসপাতাল (Sterling Hospital).
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Infrastructure: Green waste bin, street lamps, building with multiple windows.

frames.description: A man on a bicycle is riding past a small structure and more hospital signs.
frames.signs_and_transcription: STERLING HOSPITAL; Bengali: স্টার্লিং হাসপাতাল (Sterling Hospital).
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Bicycle. Pedestrians: Man riding the bicycle. Infrastructure: Buildings, street lamps, trees.

frames.description: A man is carrying a large heavy sack on his shoulder while walking along the sidewalk. There are hospital and catering service signs visible.
frames.signs_and_transcription: STERLING HOSPITAL; Bengali: স্টার্লিং হাসপাতাল (Sterling Hospital); Bengali on green board: ফেয়ারার্স ক্যাটারার (Fairars Caterer).
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Pedestrians: Porter carrying a heavy load. Infrastructure: Small shack-like shops, street lamps, trees.

frames.description: The frame is mostly occupied by the side of a white truck with a blue tarp cover, moving in front of the camera.
frames.signs_and_transcription: Truck has diamond-shaped painted patterns in yellow, green, and red.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Side of a delivery truck. Pedestrians: Driver partially visible in the cab.

frames.description: The camera view is obstructed by the side of the passing blue-tarped truck. Building facades are visible in the background above it.
frames.signs_and_transcription: No text signs visible.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Delivery truck side.

frames.description: Continued close-up view of the moving truck's blue tarp side, slightly motion-blurred.
frames.signs_and_transcription: No text signs visible.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Delivery truck side.

frames.description: The truck side remains the primary object in view as it moves across the frame.
frames.signs_and_transcription: No text signs visible.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Delivery truck side.

frames.description: Still showing the side of the blue truck. Background buildings are partially visible.
frames.signs_and_transcription: No text signs visible.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Delivery truck side.

frames.description: Passing truck continues to dominate the foreground view.
frames.signs_and_transcription: No text signs visible.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Delivery truck side.

frames.description: Foreground is still the truck's blue tarp side. Motion continues to the right.
frames.signs_and_transcription: No text signs visible.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Delivery truck side.

frames.description: Almost the entire frame is filled with the blue surface of the truck's cargo area.
frames.signs_and_transcription: No text signs visible.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Delivery truck side.

frames.description: Side of the blue truck passing by, showing more of the painted geometric diamond shapes on the lower body.
frames.signs_and_transcription: No text signs visible.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Delivery truck side.

frames.description: The rear end of the truck starts to pass, revealing more of the street scene behind it.
frames.signs_and_transcription: No text signs visible.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Delivery truck side moving away.

frames.description: The truck has passed, revealing a white car and a man walking in a yellow-and-black striped shirt. A hospital sign is visible behind them.
frames.signs_and_transcription: STERLING HOSPITAL; Bengali: স্টার্লিং হাসপাতাল (Sterling Hospital).
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: White car, blue car. Pedestrians: Man in horizontal striped shirt walking to the right. Infrastructure: Trees, buildings.

frames.description: The man in the striped shirt is walking past a small structure with various signs on its side.
frames.signs_and_transcription: STERLING HOSPITAL; Bengali on green board: ফেয়ারার্স ক্যাটারার (Fairars Caterer).
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: White car on the left edge. Pedestrians: Man in striped shirt. Infrastructure: Building, small shack, street lamps.

frames.description: Approaching a busy intersection. A large green directional sign board and traffic signals are prominent.
frames.signs_and_transcription: Direction sign board: SHYAM BAZAR R.G. KAR; DUNLOP / B.T. ROAD; LOCKGATE ROAD R.BRIDGE COSSIPORE. Bengali equivalent: শ্যাম বাজার আর.জি. কর; ডানলপ / বি.টি. রোড; লকগেট রোড আর. ব্রিজ কাশীপুর. Bengali on green shack: ফেয়ারার্স ক্যাটারার (Fairars Caterer).
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: White car. Pedestrians: Man in striped shirt. Traffic signals: Vertical traffic light assembly. Infrastructure: Large billboard, directional sign, street lamps.

frames.description: Passing a traffic island with a monument. The directional sign is still visible on the left.
frames.signs_and_transcription: Direction sign same as previous frame. Monument base: DOYEN.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: White car, silver van in the distance. Infrastructure: Traffic island with statue, monument base, trees.

frames.description: A clear view of a statue of a standing man on a pedestal in the middle of an intersection. A silver van is driving on the road.
frames.signs_and_transcription: Monument base: DOYEN.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Silver van, partial white car. Infrastructure: Statue monument, traffic island, tall trees, street lights.

frames.description: Looking back toward a broad street with several cars and billboard posters. Trees line the right side of the frame.
frames.signs_and_transcription: Various billboard advertisements in English and Bengali; yellow banner with Bengali text.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Silver van, several cars further down the road. Infrastructure: Traffic lights, street lamps, intersection crosswalk markings.

frames.description: The scene shifts to a long wall covered with numerous colorful posters. A motorcyclist and a blue car are on the road.
frames.signs_and_transcription: ROOT; various political and social posters in Bengali.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Motorcycle, blue car, partial white car. Pedestrians: A few people standing by the wall. Infrastructure: Fence, trees, boundary wall.

frames.description: Continuing along the road lined with poster-covered walls and tall leafy trees. Several motorcycles are moving through traffic.
frames.signs_and_transcription: Various posters in Bengali including images of people.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Multiple motorcycles, white car, silver van. Infrastructure: Boundary wall, fence, street lamps, dense trees.

frames.description: View of the roadside wall with many posters. A man in a red shirt is standing nearby.
frames.signs_and_transcription: Posters with Bengali text and graphics.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: Motorcycle. Pedestrians: Man in red shirt. Infrastructure: Boundary wall, trees.

frames.description: The camera passes a large red commercial billboard on a street corner. An old building is visible on the right.
frames.signs_and_transcription: Large red billboard with large Bengali text: পরিমল (Parimal); Amul sign on the building.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: White car. Infrastructure: Old multi-story building, fence, street lamps.

frames.description: Street view passing an older building with ground-floor shops. A yellow sign for mental health counseling is visible.
frames.signs_and_transcription: MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELLING; various shop signs in Bengali.
frames.vehicles_pedestrians_infrastructure: Vehicles: White car. Infrastructure: Multi-story concrete building, overhead wires, fence.
